full_text:
Qin Liang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Liang. Sent to scout by Cao Zhen, he was lured into an ambush and killed by Liao Hua. Qin Liang is a fictional character. Qin Liang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
